pr-evidence/engine-adapter-handoff-bundl.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer Boyle the 3rd initially found same-destination and hard-link collision risks; both were fixed with pre-write collision guards and regression tests, then the reviewer approved with no remaining findings.

poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests -> passed

what_changed: Added write_engine_adapter_handoff_bundle(...) for coordinated payload and JSON handoff artifact writes.
Rejected handoff_json/payload_uri destination collisions before writing, including equivalent local URI spellings and existing hard links.
Exported the helper through the document package, Cachet type facade, and legacy compatibility namespace.
Updated README handoff guidance and public API/governance regression tests.
pr-evidence/engine-adapter-handoff-bundl.why: Engine-serving integrations should have a safe public helper for producing the two durable handoff artifacts that vLLM/SGLang connector processes consume.
